title: Condom Possession Not Admissible — Prostitution Prosecution
text: The possession of a condom is not admissible as evidence in the prosecution of a violation of Section 372 of, or subdivision (a) or (b) of Section 647 of, or former Section 653.22 of, the Penal Code, if the offense is related to prostitution.

source.editorial_note: Amended by Stats. 2022, Ch. 86, Sec. 1. Effective January 1, 2023.
